title: FinanceEntry
description: A single revenue or expense record. Finance records are stored as arrays of these entries in workspace/finance/revenue.json and workspace/finance/expenses.json.

type.description: Whether this entry represents money received or money spent.

date.description: Date the transaction occurred or the period it covers (use first day of the period for monthly aggregates).

amount.description: Amount in the stated currency. Always positive; type field distinguishes revenue from expense.

source.description: Where this entry came from. For revenue: e.g. 'spotify', 'bandcamp', 'youtube', 'sync-license', 'commission', 'performance'. For expenses: e.g. 'plugin-purchase', 'distribution-fee', 'studio-time', 'equipment'.

artist_id.description: References an artist.json id if this entry is specific to one artist. Null for label-wide expenses.

release_id.description: References a release.json id if this entry is attributable to a specific release.

opportunity_id.description: References an opportunity.json id if this revenue came from a tracked opportunity.

period.description: For aggregated platform reports covering a date range rather than a single transaction.

description.description: Human-readable description. e.g. 'Spotify royalties March 2025 (via Amuse)', 'iZotope Ozone upgrade'.

notes.description: Additional context. e.g. pre-split vs post-split distinction for distributor reports.
